plugins.name: position-manager-skill
plugins.description: Solana position manager: impermanent loss, out-of-range alerts, a tax-aware rebalance expected-value decision, FIFO/HIFO/SpecID tax lots, time-weighted P&L from a local snapshot ledger, and a portfolio health report across Orca, Raydium, Meteora DLMM, and Kamino. Analysis and planning only.
